task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and returns just the bucket name.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.

Write a regex pattern that validates an AWS Lambda function name, which must start with a letter or underscore, contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens, and be between 1 and 64 characters long.
